title: Engineering Mechanics
description: This course will enable you to understand the basic rationales of engineering mechanics and it is the first step for you to enter the world of engineering studies. It entails statics and strength of materials. You are going to learn the logical way of analyzing forces in structures. The way how to determine the unknown forces in complicated structures. Based upon these analysis, you will first attempt to design simple systems systematically in terms of strength as well as rigidity of materials. In this course, you will study and understand basic theories of mechanics through various engineering examples from the real practice. Once you have basic knowledge of physics and calculus, you are good enough to cope with this course. Hope you will enjoy your studies and benefited from this course.
